description_long: This is a sleek, modern sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a bold two-tone color scheme of black and red. The hood and rear deck are painted in a vivid red, contrasting sharply with the rest of the body, which is finished in glossy black. The car features tinted windows, blacked-out wheels with a five-spoke design, and subtle side graphics marked with 'SS'. The front end is aggressive, with a wide grille and narrow headlights, while the rear showcases dual round taillights and dual exhausts. The overall design suggests high performance and urban style, with smooth, flowing lines and a muscular stance. The car appears to have two doors and is likely constructed from a combination of metal, glass, rubber, and plastic.
description: A low-profile, two-tone black and red sports car with tinted windows, five-spoke black wheels, and aggressive styling. Features include dual round taillights, dual exhausts, and 'SS' side graphics.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black body, red hood, and 'SS' graphic on the lower door, with five-spoke black wheels visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the red rear deck, dual round taillights, dual exhausts, and a compact, wide stance.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the same black and red color scheme and 'SS' graphic visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide black grille, narrow headlights, and the prominent red hood.
